_comment: World NPCs (M6). The first NPC framework — npc entities placed via POI parts (kind:'npc', npc:<id>) open a popup dialog driven by these defs. type selects behaviour (slayer_master now; shopkeeper / quest_giver / etc. later). greeting is the opening line.

slayer_master.name: Slayer Master Kr-tok
slayer_master.greeting: Looking for a hunt? I've targets that need culling — bring me proof and I'll make it worth your while.
